modules.name: BYD Global Voice Engine (iFlytek)
modules.description: All-in-one: patched SpeechHMI (whitelist bypass) + SpeechAvatar + VRdownloadXF as system apps, sys.byd.countrycode, /navi bind + SELinux relabel, voice settings, disable Cerence. Requires /navi mountpoint in system image and voice data in /data/navi.
modules.author: Ashraf
